scripts.sync:libs: mkdir -p bin-libs && cp -uf ../transport/zig-out/lib/libtransport-*.so ./bin-libs/ && arch=$(uname -m); case $arch in x86_64) arch=x86_64;; aarch64|arm64) arch=aarch64;; esac; libc=${LIBC_VARIANT:-gnu}; if [ -f ./bin-libs/libzimq-${arch}-${libc}.so ]; then cp -f ./bin-libs/libzimq-${arch}-${libc}.so ./bin-libs/libzimq.so; else cp -f ../transport/zig-out/lib/libzimq.so ./bin-libs/libzimq.so; fi
scripts.rebuild-and-sync:libs: cd ../transport && zig build -Dall=true -Doptimize=ReleaseFast && cd - >/dev/null && bun run sync:libs
